creator: andy.lavr@reactor-xg.kiev.ua
text:
Hi!


It is badly realized backport IPv6 support. Does not work on FreeBSD 
8.0-RC1.

http://git.dbmail.eu/cgit/cgit.cgi/paul/dbmail/commit/?id=fb4e2c74402abfdffcd3583be47691ef6a9252bc
